text:
In a quiet little town somewhere serene. There lived an owl. She loved things silent. That's why owls look late. One night an owl.

She flew high. It stars shimmered.

She heard whispers.

A cat?

Whiskers stroked.

She snooped.

A mouse?

Just black.

She swooped.

That's when.

Something furry.

It wasn't mouse.

You think?

A big furry thing.

Her talons.

I wouldn't mess with one like you.

You think?

I know. I protect things.

That's you huh.

No. Just things.

She snoozed.

Tomorrow.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
